lines.quest_name: Dream of A Rusted Sword: Part I

lines.text: Must be a price too heavy for me to take.
lines.quest_name: Dream of A Rusted Sword: Part I

lines.text: But most people lose everything and still gain no strength.
lines.quest_name: Dream of A Rusted Sword: Part I
Dream of A Rusted Sword: Part I

lines.text: The best you could find on the Plateaus.
lines.quest_name: Dream of A Rusted Sword: Part I

lines.text: For a Gladiator, their weapon is their second life. This was where many first came, when they set out to chase greatness.
lines.quest_name: Dream of A Rusted Sword: Part I

lines.text: I got my first sword here too. Many years ago.
lines.quest_name: Dream of A Rusted Sword: Part I
Dream of A Rusted Sword: Part I
